attending-the-ai-safety-summit-1-2-november-2023.

re%20than%20a,and%2042%25%20of%205%26P%20companies.

Dr,early%20on%20January%2011%2C%202020.

in%20vaccines%20was,on%20December%207%2C%202021.

represents%20a,is%20set%20at%20%246.86%20billion.

41. 
For example, the EU has a series of initiatives calling for greater international cooperation here: “Global Partnerships in 
Health: Details of cooperation agreements in the field of health research”, https://research-and-innovation.ec.europa.eu/
research-area/health/global-partnerships-health_en.
42.

44.

https://www.mckinsey.com/mhi/our-insights/aging-with-purpose-why-meaningful-engagement-with-society-matters.
45. 
Significant cyberattacks defined as those with an estimated impact of greater than $1 million or involving over 1 million 
files leaked classified as significant.
46. 
Lewis, James Andrew, Zhanna L. Malekos Smith, and Eugenia Lostri, “The Hidden Costs of Cybercrime”, CSIS, 9 
December 2020, https://www.csis.org/analysis/hidden-costs-cybercrime.
47.

https://www.zdnet.com/article/a-decade-of-hacking-the-most-notable-cyber-security-events-of-the-20105/.

Ibid.

PMC5461132/.
51. 
UNHCR, “Global Trends”, https://www.unhcr.org/global-trends.
